title: What I build for you
description: Mobile apps, macOS apps, custom solutions — everything is designed for your users and delivered turnkey.

cards.title: Mobile App
cards.description: An iOS and Android app with a single codebase. React Native for native performance and efficient development.

cards.title: macOS App
cards.description: A native Mac app, optimized for the Apple ecosystem. Swift and SwiftUI for perfect integration.

cards.title: Custom
cards.description: A specific need? I adapt to your project. Consulting, design, development and deployment.
